additional_rules.name: field-autowired
additional_rules.message: @Autowired on field — use constructor injection instead
additional_rules.fix_hint: Remove @Autowired from the field. Add a constructor parameter (or use Lombok @RequiredArgsConstructor) and assign to a private final field.

additional_rules.name: entity-in-controller-response
additional_rules.message: Entity returned from controller — use a DTO (Response record) instead
additional_rules.fix_hint: Create a response DTO (e.g., XxxResponse record) and map the entity to it before returning from the controller.

additional_rules.name: request-mapping-without-method
additional_rules.message: @RequestMapping without explicit method — should specify GET, POST, etc. or use @GetMapping/@PostMapping
additional_rules.fix_hint: Replace @RequestMapping with a specific mapping annotation (@GetMapping, @PostMapping, etc.) or add method = RequestMethod.GET/POST.

additional_rules.name: console-output-in-production
additional_rules.message: Console output or printStackTrace in production code — use SLF4J logger instead
additional_rules.fix_hint: Replace System.out/System.err with an SLF4J logger. Replace printStackTrace() with log.error("message", exception).

additional_boundaries.name: Controller must not import repository directly
